sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9583" key="a)ntekfe/rw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντεκ-φέρω</orth>, <sense id="n9583.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bring out against, oppose,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τί τινι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.72e</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
